subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee, by the effulgent lights of Thy Countenance, to clothe the dwellers of the realm of contingent being with the robe of forgiveness and adorn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی اسئلک بانوار وجهک بان تلبس اهل الامکان ردآء الغفران و زین یا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
